question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NftAllowanceService.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getNftAllowances(NftAllowanceRequest)] Can an unprivileged external user exploit a network partition to cause the JOOQ fetchInto(NftAllowance.class) call in repository.findAll() to partially deserialize a result set before the connection drops, resulting in a corrupted or incomplete Collection<NftAllowance> being returned to the caller without any error indication?
